accepts_data.military_flights: Array of military aircraft with lat, lng, callsign, type
accepts_data.gdelt_events: Array of conflict events with lat, lng, event_type, goldstein_scale
accepts_data.gps_jamming: Array of GPS jamming zones with lat, lng, radius
accepts_data.fires: Array of FIRMS fire detections with lat, lng, brightness
accepts_data.ships: Array of AIS vessel objects with lat, lng, type, name
